title: SILAG Startup Marketing Page
description: Created and improved a TypeScript marketing page for the SILAG Startup project, then configured Git version control and pushed the work from VS Code to GitHub.

title: Client Page Creation and Content Migration
description: Built client-facing pages, migrated content into HTML templates, formatted vehicle comparison pages, and revised page templates for multiple client assignments.

title: Assigned Website SEO and QA Review
description: Checked media queries, SEO meta tags, map links, internal links, H1 structure, page descriptions, and mobile content behavior across assigned websites.

title: Disaster Response and Emergency Verification Web and Mobile App
description: Researched, prototyped, hosted, and iteratively improved a web application for Disaster Response and Emergency Verification, including admin dashboards, reporter and dispatcher pages, and bug fixes. Created a mobile version of the Disaster Response and Emergency Verification platform, configured API access for physical phones, and improved mobile reporter workflows.

title: Deskdine
description: Researched, developed, and improved a web-based café management system, including dedicated webpages for admin, staff, and café staff with role-based authentication and Supabase integration. Implemented daily menu deadline handling, automatic expiry synchronization for expired menus, and enhanced menu management workflows across the platform.

title: Internship Portfolio and Activity Log
description: Consolidated Makerspace Innovhub internship activities into a local data-driven Next.js portfolio with filterable projects, Markdown logs, static generation, and SEO metadata.
